content: 2026 Sentry alternatives: GlitchTip and Bugsink are Sentry-SDK-compatible drop-ins (self-host focus); Rollbar and Bugsnag are managed alternatives (Bugsnag strongest for mobile); PostHog and Better Stack bundle error tracking with analytics/logs. For a React SPA + Vercel serverless showcase SaaS, hosted Sentry free tier remains the default choice; GlitchTip only if self-hosting is required.
